title: Barbie & Kendra Crash Joe Bob's Drive-In Jamboree
original_title: Barbie & Kendra Crash Joe Bob's Drive-In Jamboree!
overview: Barbie and Kendra head to Vegas to crash horror host Joe Bob Briggs' annual Drive-In movie meltdown and profess their love to the trash lovin' Texan and his sexy sidekick Darcy. But as the ladies settle in for some primo cinematic slop, they learn that a ruthless land baron is planning to turn their crush's outdoor horror movie palace into a golf course!
